description_long: This is a modern bungalow with a flat roof and a clean, rectangular layout. The structure features large windows on the front facade, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. A wooden fence encloses a backyard area that includes a swimming pool and a small patio, surrounded by several trees. The exterior walls are finished in a light gray color, contrasting with the natural wood of the fence and the blue of the pool. The property is set within a landscaped area with evenly spaced trees, enhancing its suburban appeal. The overall design emphasizes open outdoor living spaces and a minimalist architectural style.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large front windows, a fenced backyard with a pool, and surrounded by trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, and the arrangement of trees around the property.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, backyard pool, and wooden fence enclosure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard pool, patio area, and the symmetrical arrangement of trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side entrance, pool area, and the continuation of the wooden fence.
